description: Summarizes practical features of the current registered Danish passenger-car fleet. Use for questions about towing capability, towing weights, five-seat and seven-seat cars, or taxi-suitable cars.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL tow_capable = TO_INTEGER(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingMulighed), taxi_suitable = TO_INTEGER(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningEgnetTilTaxi), seats = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningSiddepladserMinimum, braked_towing_weight = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingsvaegtMedBremser, 0, 5000) | STATS cars_with_tow_capability = SUM(tow_capable), cars_without_tow_capability = COUNT(*) - SUM(tow_capable), avg_braked_towing_weight = AVG(braked_towing_weight), max_braked_towing_weight_capped = MAX(braked_towing_weight), five_seat_cars = SUM(CASE(seats == 5, 1, 0)), seven_seat_cars = SUM(CASE(seats == 7, 1, 0)), taxi_suitable_cars = SUM(taxi_suitable) | LIMIT 1
